title: Chapter 1680 Infinite Spiraling Abyss
content:
Chapter 1680 Infinite Spiraling Abyss

"With that said, it is clear that you still lack the cultivation to truly utilize its true power." Long Yejun said as the wound on his arm quickly healed.

"Yes, that feels like a fraction of its true potential. Unfortunately, that was the best I can do with my cultivation."

Yuan sighed, but he wasn't discouraged. If anything, he was excited for the future when his cultivation was sufficient enough to call down the true Heaven's Final Judgement.

'I guess the technique isn't Celetial-grade for no reason.' He smiled inwardly.

Yuan wanted to test Heaven's Bane and the Baneful Abyss, but he felt that it was too dangerous. While his techniques may not affect Long Yejun, poison was a different story, especially when it's one of the strongest poison in the world.

'There is a good chance that the poison won't affect him, but there's no reason to risk it just to satisfy my curiosity. I can test it later on people who really deserve it. As for Primordial Fire… let's not reveal too much just in case.'

With that decided, Yuan ended his testing there.

"Alright, I am done here," he said a moment later.

"So, which training ground will you attempt to conquer next?"

Yuan began pondering.

He'd already conquered the three biggest and most useful elements out there: fire, lightning, and poison.

His lightning immunity made him unaffected by even heavenly tribulations. His poison immunity made it impossible to assassinate or poison him. As for his fire immunity, the fire element was one of the most widely used elements in the cultivation world.

After pondering for some time, Yuan smiled and said, "I want to try my hands at the Infinite Spiraling Abyss."

Long Yejun's eyes widened as he hastily exclaimed, "No, you don't!"

"The Infinite Spiraling Abyss is arguably the most dangerous training ground in the Divine Dragon—in the entire Primal Expanse!"

Yuan was surprised by his reaction and asked, "For you to react like this… Is this place really that dangerous?"

"You have no idea! Only those who have a good understanding of the power of the void should think of training there. Even if you're an expert, a single mistake and you'll instantly be consumed by the Infinite Spiraling Abyss and never return!"

The power of the void, simply put, was the power to control space itself. If one could master this ability, one would have the freedom to traverse anywhere in the world.

This power was incredibly potent and filled with infinite possibilities, but it was also the most difficult and dangerous to cultivate, with countless casualties just trying to understand the surface of it. Hence, only a handful of cultivators dare to pursue it, and most of them do so after becoming powerful Immortals. However, even to this day, not a single cultivator has ever mastered the power of the void.

'I am well aware of how dangerous the power of the void is…' Yuan sighed inwardly. 'After all, not a single of my previous incarnations had any understanding of it despite being peak figures in their era—at least as far as I am aware.'

However, to be fair, none of them had tried to understand the power of the void, as the very concept itself was nearly nonexistent, and they were busy pursuing other paths.

"Don't worry, I understand how dangerous the power of the void is, and I am not going to directly challenge the Infinite Spiraling Abyss. I am going to study it from the outside and try to understand it first."

"I see… if you're only going to study it from the outside, I guess it'll be fine." Long Yejun mumbled.

A few days later, they arrived at the Infinite Spiraling Abyss, located inside a massive crack in the ground, its depths disappearing into darkness.

Unlike the Sky Splitting Dragon's Tribulation, this place was completely empty.

"So this is the Infinite Spiraling Abyss…" Despite being miles away, Yuan could feel a vacuuming force emanating from the crack, as if it were trying to pull him into its endless depths.

"Be careful, or you'll get sucked inside." Long Yejun warned him.

"I'll be right back."

Before Yuan started his training, he logged off and wrote a note to the others in case he lost track of the time again.

Since the Eternal Lotuses no longer needed his help with the spiritual bath, Yuan could spend more time in Cultivation Online without logging off.

Once he returned to the Primal Expanse, Yuan immediately began trying to understand the power of the void.

As Yuan became focused, Long Yejun looked at him and wondered, 'Will he actually understand the power of the void like this?'

He didn't mention it to Yuan because he wanted to see what Yuan was capable of, but there was another training ground in the Divine Dragon Sanctuary for those who wanted to understand the power of the void, and it was a much easier place specifically for beginners like Yuan.

The Infinite Spiraling Abyss was meant for experts—those who already have a good understanding of the power of the void.

'The others told me to contact them if Brother Yuan visits another training ground, but this place is dangerous, and the fewer distractions there are, the better.'

Trying to understand the power of the void was no joke, even for powerful beings like dragons.

In the entire Primal Expanse, the number of beings who had fully grasped the understanding of the power of the void was fewer than ten—and this referred solely to the comprehension of its nature, not the ability to wield the power itself.

'Besides the Primal Monarch, Dragon God, and Primordial Phoenix, I cannot imagine another being capable of wielding the power of the void. Not even the Abyssal Dragon, who is known as the Void Dragon Monarch, could wield such power to its full potential…'

As Yuan stared into the Infinite Spiraling Abyss, he gradually fell into a trance, much like the state he experienced when he first comprehended Dragon's Gaze.
